state_transition.description: Implemented smoke tests for release artifacts

work_completed.primary: Smoke test suite implementation and integration

v_automation.rationale: Smoke tests fully integrated into automated release workflow. Artifacts automatically verified before GitHub release creation. No manual testing required.
v_automation.calculation: 13/17 release steps automated (step added for smoke tests, auto-blocks on failure)

v_reliability.rationale: Release artifacts verified before publication. Broken releases blocked automatically. Risk factors reduced from 2 to 1 (only external service failures remain).

v_speed.rationale: Smoke tests add ~2 minutes to release workflow, but prevent manual debugging of broken releases (net neutral). CI time: 5-7 minutes total.
v_speed.calculation: No change - smoke test time (~2 min) offset by eliminated debugging time

v_observability.rationale: Clear smoke test results provide release quality visibility. Failed tests include actionable error messages. CI logs show detailed test breakdown.
v_observability.calculation: 6/9 observability factors covered (added: artifact verification visibility)

v_completeness.rationale: Documented 3/5 CI/CD methodology components: (1) Quality gates [complete], (2) CHANGELOG automation [complete], (3) Smoke tests [complete], (4) Deployment [0%], (5) Observability [0%].

v_effectiveness.rationale: Validated 4.5/10 CI/CD patterns: (1) Coverage gates, (2) Lint blocking, (3) CHANGELOG validation, (4) Commit parsing, (5) Smoke testing [new, partial validation].

v_reusability.rationale: 3/4 reusable components: Quality gates [complete], CHANGELOG automation [complete], Smoke testing [complete]. Language-agnostic patterns applicable to Python, JavaScript, Ruby, Rust projects.
v_reusability.calculation: 3/4 = 0.75, adjusted to 0.70 for smoke test methodology pending full documentation

honest_assessment.explanation: V_instance(s₃) = 0.780 is BELOW target of 0.80, but VERY CLOSE. Initial projection was optimistic (0.820 expected). Actual improvement (+0.046) lower than expected (+0.086) due to conservative calculation of observability and automation components.
why_below_target: Smoke tests only test linux-amd64 natively (not all 5 platforms) - partial automation
Observability gains limited to smoke test reporting (no metrics dashboard yet)
Speed improvement neutral (2 min added) rather than positive
Conservative reliability calculation (1 risk factor remains: external service failures)
remaining_work_for_0_80: - Add deployment automation (plugin marketplace sync) → +0.03 automation
honest_assessment.honest_reflection: Did not quite reach 0.80 target, but extremely close (gap: 0.020). Smoke tests provide substantial value (+0.046) and are production-ready. The 0.80 target can be reached in Iteration 4 with minimal additional work.

objectives_complete.rationale: Smoke tests implemented, integrated, tested, and working

convergence_assessment.overall: NOT_CONVERGED (but significant progress toward instance convergence)

agent_validation_builder.role: Design smoke test suite and validation logic

cross_domain_reuse.success: EXCELLENT - agent's validation expertise transferred perfectly

coder.role: Implement smoke test script and workflow integration
tasks_completed: Integrated into GitHub Actions workflow (+23 lines)
Added error handling and clear reporting

doc_writer.role: Extract smoke testing methodology (deferred to EVOLVE phase)
